news.title: Purdue Engineering rallies Boilermaker community to raise nearly $12 million on Day of Giving
news.summary_en: Purdue University celebrated its 13th annual Day of Giving on April 29 with a powerful show of support for its College of Engineering, with 340 gifts totaling nearly $12 million in just 24 hours given to advance education, research and student success.

news.title: Purdue Engineering to host Latin American academic leaders for inaugural LIDER program
news.summary_en: This May, Purdue Engineering will welcome a select group of engineering academic leaders from across Latin America for the Leadership Institute for Developing Excellence in Research, Education and Administration (LIDER).

news.title: Purdue engineering management students gain global experience through sustainability project in Costa Rica
news.summary_en: Students from Purdue University's Master of Engineering Management (MEM) program are turning classroom knowledge into real-world impact through an international sustainability project in Costa Rica.

news.title: MSE's Bahr joins prestigious ranks of MRS fellows
news.summary_en: Dave Bahr has been selected as a 2026 Materials Research Society (MRS) fellow in recognition of his sustained and distinguished contributions to the advancement of materials research.
